name: Energy Surge
effect: Expend ALL your Will. Add additional Damage Dice equal to Will spent, in addition to your current Will prior to the move's use. Regain 1 Will at the start of your subsequent turns until you've restored 5 Will.
description: Power overflowing! Sure you'll be weak for a while, but what does it matter when you can tear your foe's atoms apart with just a thought!
